prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e7b06bea`.
codex_response:
Implemented `e7b06bea` end to end. The rule is: keep the left `5` bar, use its height as the block size, then collapse the constant right-side color stripes into a single column placed immediately to the left of that stripe block, cycling the stripe colors top-to-bottom in blocks of that size.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint, but corrected/discarded the Sonnet hint because it places the output in the first stripe column instead of the zero column just to its left; that note is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e7b06bea/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed in `arc2/dsl_ext.py`. The generator stays close to the official family: only a top-anchored `5` bar, a blank middle gap, and a full-height 2- or 3-color stripe block on the right, with heights constrained to `5..14`.
